task_completion.description: Verify that the patient record for Ana Isabel Betz has been opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health interface should display 'Ana Isabel Betz' as the active patient in the main view or patient tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chronic Kidney Disease Stage 3b has been formally documented in the patient's conditions or evaluations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a diagnosis, condition, or evaluation entry explicitly mentioning 'Chronic Kidney Disease Stage 3b' or 'CKD Stage 3b' (or corresponding ICD-10 code) in the patient's medical record.

task_completion.description: Verify that a comprehensive renal monitoring panel has been ordered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for lab test requests/orders (e.g., renal panel, eGFR, creatinine, albuminuria) in the 'Lab' or 'Investigations' section of the patient's record.

task_completion.description: Verify that renoprotective pharmacotherapy has been prescribed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new prescription or medication order for renoprotective drugs (such as ACE inhibitors or ARBs) in the 'Medications' or 'Prescriptions' tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that dietary counseling for renal diet compliance has been documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for clinical notes, lifestyle recommendations, or evaluation text explicitly mentioning 'renal diet', 'dietary counseling', or 'diet compliance'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 3-month nephrology follow-up appointment has been scheduled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a scheduled appointment in the 'Appointments' section set for approximately 3 months from the current date, ideally noting 'nephrology' or 'follow-up'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health desktop client or web interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the appropriate structured fields for medical records rather than dumping text into a single generic note.
integrity.visual_evidence: Prescriptions should be in the medication module, labs in the lab module, and conditions in the disease/condition module, not just typed as a single paragraph in a free-text notepad.

integrity.description: Ensure the actions were performed in the actual application and not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding window frames, menus, and icons must belong to GNU Health.
